name: ssot-req
description: Emit a requirements ledger from an existing SSOT and verify it is non-placeholder

tasks.content: Read current SSOT and existing req artifact
tasks.detail: Inspect <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml and <ip>/req/<ip>_requirements.md. Identify whether the req file is missing, placeholder-only, or stale relative to SSOT sections.
tasks.criteria:
SSOT path exists and parses
Existing req state is classified
No RTL or TB files are modified during this step

tasks.detail: Run workflow/req-gen/scripts/emit_requirements_from_ssot.py <ip> --root . so the req document captures purpose, interfaces, function model, cycle model, registers/memory, timing, DV scenarios, quality gates, and traceability.
tasks.criteria:
<ip>/req/<ip>_requirements.md exists
File has substantive content and no TBD/TODO/FIXME placeholders
Every major SSOT contract section appears in the requirements ledger

tasks.detail: Use ATLAS /api/progress?scope=<ip> or equivalent backend check to confirm req status is ok and the strict signoff gate no longer blocks on REQ capture.
tasks.criteria:
progress.req.status is ok
progress.signoff does not list REQ capture as a blocker
Evidence is reported with file path and byte count
